meta.siteDescription: Armenian artistic duo offering bridal singing, event dance and singing & dance lessons. Based in Belgium, available throughout Europe.
meta.ogTitle: Rozi Dance — The Armenian Soul in Motion
meta.ogDescription: Armenian singing and dance performances for weddings, ceremonies and events. Singing & dance lessons for all levels.

hero.subtitle: Artistic duo & group for weddings, celebrations and private events.

items.title: Weddings & celebrations
items.description: Weddings, baptisms, birthdays, children's parties or private evenings — we bring your events to life with singing, dance and tailor-made performances.

items.title: The art of singing
items.description: A voice for every occasion. Traditional, contemporary or personalised singing, in several languages, to accompany your most precious moments.

items.title: Singing & dance — lessons
items.description: Singing and dance lessons, individual or group, for all levels and ages. Several teaching languages, from beginner to advanced.

items.quote: An absolutely magical moment. Rozi Dance's songs moved our entire family — a memory forever engraved.
items.author: Ani & Saro

items.quote: Professional, talented and warm. The dance elevated our evening — guests are still talking about it.
items.author: Nadia M.

items.quote: My children love the lessons. The atmosphere is caring and the transmission of Armenian culture is wonderful.
items.author: Christine K.

items.a: Yes, we perform throughout Europe. Travel fees may apply depending on the distance. Contact us for a personalised quote.

items.q: How far in advance should we book?
items.a: We recommend contacting us at least 2 to 3 months before the event to ensure availability, especially during peak season (May–September).
Absolutely. Each performance is tailored to your wishes: choice of songs, duration, costumes. We discuss everything in advance to create something unique.

items.q: Are lessons accessible to complete beginners?
items.a: Absolutely. We welcome all levels, from absolute beginners to experienced practitioners. Each lesson is adapted to each student's pace and goals.

items.q: Can we combine several performances for the same event?
items.a: Yes, and that's often what we recommend. For example, bridal singing in the morning and a dance performance in the evening — we build the programme with you.

apropos.title: Two voices, two bodies, one tradition
apropos.p1: Rozi Dance is above all a story of shared passion for Armenian culture. Trained from childhood in traditional arts, we perpetuate a millennia-old musical and choreographic heritage with a contemporary sensibility.
apropos.p2: Whether at a bride's dressing ceremony, a grand wedding banquet or in the dance studio, we put our heart and soul into the beauty of our traditions.

contact.title: Let's talk about your event
contact.subtitle: Contact us via your preferred channel — we respond within 24 hours.

cours.pageTitle: Armenian singing & dance lessons — Rozi Dance
cours.pageDescription: Armenian and international singing lessons, Armenian folk dance lessons. Individual and group, all levels, remote possible.
cours.heroSubtitle: Lessons accessible to all, from beginner to advanced, in person or remotely.
cours.chantDescription: Discover the traditional Armenian repertoire as well as international songs. Our lessons adapt to your voice and level, whether beginner or advanced.
cours.danseDescription: Discover Armenian folk dances or perfect your technique. Solo or group lessons, in a warm and welcoming atmosphere.

faqItems.q: Do I need to know how to sing to enrol?
faqItems.a: Not at all! Our lessons are for all levels, from complete beginners to experienced singers wishing to specialise in Armenian repertoire.
Lessons can be conducted in French, Russian or Armenian according to your preference. Songs are of course taught in their original language (Armenian), with explanations of the texts.
Yes, we offer lessons via video conference (Zoom, Google Meet). This option is available for individual singing and dance lessons.

faqItems.q: How long does it take to learn a song?
faqItems.a: Generally, a simple song can be learned in 2 to 4 sessions. More complex pieces take longer. It all depends on your level and practice between lessons.

faqItems.q: Do you offer lessons to prepare a wedding song?
faqItems.a: Absolutely! This is one of our specialities. We can prepare you to sing at your own wedding ceremony, with a bespoke programme adapted to your schedule.

faqItems.q: Are dance lessons suitable for beginners?
faqItems.a: Yes, all our dance lessons start from the basics. No prior dance experience is required. We progress at your pace.

faqItems.q: Can singing and dance lessons be combined?
faqItems.a: Absolutely, and it's what we recommend! Contact us for a personalised programme.

faqItems.q: Do group lessons have a minimum number of participants?
faqItems.a: Group lessons start from 4 people. They are ideal for cultural associations, groups of friends or event preparation.

faqItems.q: Can lessons be given as a gift?
faqItems.a: Yes, we offer gift vouchers for individual sessions or packages. Contact us by e-mail to order one.
We accept bank transfer (BE) and cash for in-person lessons. Details are provided at enrolment.

cours.ctaSubtitle: Contact us to choose the option that suits you.
